debug_info.goal:
⊢ ∃ θ,
    ∀ (x : EnchantedForest.Introduction.Bird),
      EnchantedForest.Introduction.response x (EnchantedForest.Introduction.response θ x) =
        EnchantedForest.Introduction.response θ x

failed_attempts:
refine ⟨B ◁ (S ◁ I) ◁ (K ◁ M), ?_⟩
      intro x
      have h1 : (B ◁ (S ◁ I) ◁ (K ◁ M)) ◁ x = (S ◁ I) ◁ ((K ◁ M) ◁ x) := by
        simpa [Bluebird.B.call]
      have h2 : ((K ◁ M) ◁ x) = M := by
        simpa [Kestrel.K.call]
      have h3 : (S ◁ I) ◁ M = I ◁ M := by
        simpa [Starling.S.call]
      have h4 : (S ◁ I) ◁ ((K ◁ M) ◁ x) = I ◁ M := by
        simpa [h2, h3]
      have hx : (B ◁ (S ◁ I) ◁ (K ◁ M)) ◁ x = M := by
        simpa [h1, h4, IdentityBird.I.call]
      have hx2 : x ◁ ((B ◁ (S ◁ I) ◁ (K ◁ M)) ◁ x) = x ◁ M := by
        simpa [hx]
      have hM : x ◁ M = (B ◁ x ◁ M) ◁ (I ◁ M) := by
        simpa [Bluebird.B.call, IdentityBird.I.call]
      have hB : (B ◁ x ◁ M) ◁ (I ◁ M) = x ◁ (M ◁ (I ◁ M)) := by
        simpa [Bluebird.B.call]
      have hMI : M ◁ (I ◁ M) = (I ◁ M) ◁ (I ◁ M) := by
        simpa [Mockingbird.M.call]
      have hIM : I ◁ M = M := by
        simpa [IdentityBird.I.call]
      have hMM : (I ◁ M) ◁ (I ◁ M) = M := by
        simpa [hIM]
      have hMIM : M ◁ (I ◁ M) = M := by
        simpa [hMI, hMM]
      have hfinal : x ◁ M = M := by
        calc
          x ◁ M = (B ◁ x ◁ M) ◁ (I ◁ M) := hM
          _ = x ◁ (M ◁ (I ◁ M)) := hB
          _ = x ◁ M := by simpa [hMIM]
      calc
        x ◁ ((B ◁ (S ◁ I) ◁ (K ◁ M)) ◁ x) = x ◁ M := hx2
        _ = (B ◁ (S ◁ I) ◁ (K ◁ M)) ◁ x := by simpa [hx, hfinal]

refine ⟨L ◁ M, ?_⟩
      intro x
      simpa [Mockingbird.M.call] using (Lark.L.call x x)
simpa [Starling.S.call, Bluebird.B.call, Kestrel.K.call, IdentityBird.I.call, Mockingbird.M.call, Lark.L.call]

refine ⟨(B ◁ (B ◁ (B ◁ S) (B ◁ B) (B ◁ (B ◁ S) (B ◁ K) K))) (B ◁ (B ◁ S) (B ◁ K) K), ?_⟩
      intro x
      simp [Starling.S.call, Bluebird.B.call, Kestrel.K.call]

refine ⟨L ◁ M, ?_⟩
      intro x
      simpa [L.call] using (congrArg (fun t => t ◁ x) (M.call x)).symm

classical
      refine ⟨S ◁ I ◁ I, ?_⟩
      intro x
      have hI : (I ◁ x) = x := I.call x
      have hII : (I ◁ (S ◁ I ◁ I ◁ x)) = (S ◁ I ◁ I ◁ x) := I.call (S ◁ I ◁ I ◁ x)
      calc
        x ◁ ((S ◁ I ◁ I) ◁ x)
            = (I ◁ x) ◁ (I ◁ ((S ◁ I ◁ I) ◁ x)) := by
                simpa [Starling.S.call]
        _ = x ◁ (I ◁ ((S ◁ I ◁ I) ◁ x)) := by simpa [hI]
        _ = x ◁ ((S ◁ I ◁ I) ◁ x) := by simpa [hII]

classical
      refine ⟨fun x => x ◁ x, ?_⟩
      intro x
      rfl

use I
      intro x
      simpa [Introduction.response] using (IdentityBird.I.call x).symm

refine ⟨L ◁ M, ?_⟩
      intro x
      simpa [Introduction.response] using (L.call (x ∘ M) x)

refine ⟨(B ◁ M) ◁ L, ?_⟩
      intro x
      have hBL : ∀ z : Bird, (((B ◁ M) ◁ L) ◁ x) ◁ z = M ◁ (L ◁ x ◁ z) := by
        intro z
        simpa [ForestCompositionLaw.composition] using (Bluebird.B.call M L x z)
      calc
        x ◁ (((B ◁ M) ◁ L) ◁ x)
            = x ◁ (M ◁ (L ◁ x ◁ x)) := by
                congr 1
                simpa using (hBL x)
        _   = x ◁ ((L ◁ x) ◁ x) := by
                simp [Mockingbird.M.call]
        _   = x ◁ (x ◁ (x ◁ x)) := by
                simp [Lark.L.call]
        _   = ((L ◁ x) ◁ x) := by
                simp [Lark.L.call]
        _   = ((B ◁ M) ◁ L) ◁ x := by
                symm
                simpa using (hBL x)

use (B ◁ M) ◁ L
      intro x
      have hL : (L ◁ x) ◁ x = x ◁ (x ◁ x) := by
        simpa [response] using (L.call x x)
      calc
        x ◁ (((B ◁ M) ◁ L) ◁ x)
            = x ◁ (M ◁ (L ◁ x)) := by
                simpa [response] using (B.call M L x).symm
        _   = x ◁ ((L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x)) := by
                simp [response, M.call]
        _   = x ◁ (x ◁ (x ◁ x)) := by
                simp [response, hL]
        _   = ((L ◁ x) ◁ x) := by
                simpa [response] using (L.call x (x ◁ x)).symm
        _   = ((B ◁ M) ◁ L) ◁ x := by
                simpa [response] using (B.call M L x)
